trial_type.Description: Category of the trial presented to the participant.

Levels.FIXCROSS: Fixation cross display; no task-relevant stimuli were presented and the participant remained passive.
Levels.CUE_START: Instruction screen informing the participant that the task will start shortly.
Levels.CUE_LISTEN: Instruction screen instructing the participant to listen attentively to the musical excerpt that will be played.
Levels.CUE_PLAYBACK_RIGHT_HAND: Instruction screen instructing the participant to reproduce the previously heard musical excerpt using the right hand.
Levels.CUE_PLAYBACK_BOTH_HANDS: Instruction screen instructing the participant to reproduce the previously heard musical excerpt using both hands.
Levels.RESPONSE: Event marking a key press or key release on the MIDI keyboard during the participant’s performance.

melody_number.Description: Identifier of the musical excerpt that was presented or performed by the participant.

melody_part.Description: Segment of the given musical excerpt performed or presented.

Levels.1: First part of the musical excerpt.
Levels.2: Second part of the musical excerpt.

key.Description: System identifier of the pressed or released key on the MIDI keyboard (e.g., MIDI key number).

sound.Description: Musical pitch corresponding to the pressed or released key, including pitch class and octave.

action.Description: Type of motor action executed on the MIDI key.

Levels.press: Key press event on the MIDI keyboard.
Levels.release: Key release event on the MIDI keyboard.
